/home/codespace/noVNC/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -O3 -DNDEBUG  -lidbfs.js -s USE_GLFW=3 --shell-file /home/codespace/my_game/web/minshell.html --preload-file /home/codespace/my_game/resources/@resources/ -s GL_ENABLE_GET_PROC_ADDRESS=1 -s ASYNCIFY -s ASYNCIFY_IGNORE_INDIRECT -sUSE_GLFW=3 -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=ccall CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o -o main.html  /home/codespace/noVNC/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/cache/sysroot/lib/libraylib.a
